heading: Sunday Night
text: Showers and thunderstorms, a few producing heavy rain and gusty winds mainly north of route 4. Storms tapering off in NY late. Lows in the 50s near 60, upper 40s in the Adirondacks. Winds south 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, shifting to the northwest and decreasing to 10 mph.

heading: Monday
text: Showers ending early. Numerous clouds through the northern mountains, with a few passing showers. Becoming partly sunny in valleys south. Much cooler, and less humid. Highs in the 60s to mid 70, upper 70s in the southwest valleys. Winds northwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Areas of river valley fog. Lows in the upper 40s to mid 50s. West winds becoming calm.
